name.comment: Short name or acronym of the tool.

description.comment: Free-text description of what the tool does.

type.comment: Tool category or role (e.g. Taxonomic Profiler).

latest_release.comment: Latest release of the tool/database as of today.

curated_release.comment: Release version recorded at the time of last curation of this entry.

supports_longreads.comment: Indicates support for long-read sequencing data.

supports_shortreads.comment: Indicates support for short-read sequencing data.

taxonomy.comment: Taxonomy used by the tool (NCBI or GTDB)

uses_databases.label: has input
uses_databases.comment: List of database identifiers that the tool can use. Each item: object with name, @id and optional release.
